name: Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh (Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh Beach Resort)
address: D6B2 , D7A1 Nguyen Tat Thanh, Cam Hải Đông, Nha Trang, Việt Nam
description:
Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh - Nơi lý tưởng cho kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh là một trong những khách sạn 5 sao nổi tiếng tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam. Với vị trí đắc địa tại thành phố biển xinh đẹp này, khách sạn mang đến một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời cho du khách.

Với 200 phòng nghỉ sang trọng, Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh đảm bảo sự thoải mái và tiện nghi cho du khách. Khách sạn đã được tu sửa lại vào năm 2022, mang đến không gian mới mẻ và hiện đại. Được xây dựng từ năm 2017, khách sạn tự hào với kiến trúc độc đáo và thiết kế tinh tế.

Thời gian nhận phòng bắt đầu từ 02:00 PM và thời gian trả phòng đến 12:00 PM. Với khoảng cách 30 km từ trung tâm thành phố, du khách dễ dàng tiếp cận các điểm tham quan và giải trí. Điểm đặc biệt là chỉ mất 15 phút di chuyển từ sân bay đến khách sạn, giúp du khách tiết kiệm thời gian và tiện lợi hơn.

Chính sách về trẻ em của khách sạn là không cho phép trẻ em nghỉ miễn phí. Có thể có các khoản phụ phí áp dụng cho trẻ em.

Tiện ích giải trí tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách một loạt các tiện ích giải trí đa dạng. Khách sạn này có các cửa hàng, quầy bar và salon để du khách có thể mua sắm và thưởng thức những đồ uống thú vị. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ massage, bồn tắm nước nóng, phòng xông hơi và spa để du khách có thể thư giãn và tận hưởng những giây phút thư thái tuyệt vời. Các khu vườn xanh mát và phòng hát karaoke cũng sẽ mang đến những trải nghiệm giải trí thú vị. Du khách cũng có thể tìm mua những món quà lưu niệm tại cửa hàng quà tặng của khách sạn.

Cơ sở vật chất thể thao tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, mang đến cho khách hàng một loạt cơ sở vật chất thể thao đa dạng và đẳng cấp. Khách hàng có thể tận hưởng không gian bơi lội trong nhà, sân golf ngay tại khuôn viên, phòng tập gym hiện đại, sân tennis tiện nghi và bể bơi ngoài trời. Ngoài ra, khu nghỉ dưỡng còn có bãi biển riêng tư tuyệt đẹp, quầy bar bên hồ bơi, hoạt động lặn biển thú vị và phòng yoga để du khách thư giãn. Bên cạnh đó, khách hàng cũng có thể tận hưởng không gian tập thể dục miễn phí tại trung tâm thể hình của khu nghỉ dưỡng.

Tiện nghi thuận tiện tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, mang đến cho du khách một loạt các tiện nghi thuận tiện. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, giặt là, dịch vụ phòng, hòm đựng đồ an toàn, lễ tân, Wi-Fi công cộng, Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng, giặt khô, dịch vụ nhận phòng/nhận phòng nhanh, kho để hành lý và dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày.

Khách sạn Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh đảm bảo rằng du khách sẽ có trải nghiệm thoải mái và tiện lợi. Với dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ, du khách có thể yên tâm gọi đồ ăn hoặc đồ uống vào bất kỳ thời điểm nào trong ngày. Dịch vụ giặt là và giặt khô sẽ giúp du khách có thể duy trì quần áo sạch sẽ trong suốt kỳ nghỉ. Ngoài ra, dịch vụ nhận phòng/nhận phòng nhanh sẽ giúp du khách tiết kiệm thời gian và tránh xếp hàng dài. Wi-Fi miễn phí trong tất cả các phòng và khu vực công cộng cung cấp cho du khách sự kết nối liên tục và tiện lợi. Đặc biệt, dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày sẽ giúp du khách luôn có một căn phòng sạch sẽ và gọn gàng.

Tiện nghi vận chuyển tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi vận chuyển để đảm bảo khách hàng có một trải nghiệm thuận tiện và dễ dàng khi di chuyển. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ đưa đón từ sân bay, giúp khách hàng tiết kiệm thời gian và công sức trong việc tìm đường đi. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng có dịch vụ đỗ xe valet và bãi đỗ xe, giúp khách hàng có thể dễ dàng tìm chỗ để đậu xe của mình. 

Nếu bạn muốn khám phá Nha Trang và các điểm tham quan xung quanh, khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ xe đưa đón miễn phí. Bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ này để khám phá thành phố mà không cần lo lắng về việc đi lại. Ngoài ra, khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ đặt vé và dịch vụ taxi, giúp khách hàng thuận tiện trong việc đi lại và khám phá các điểm tham quan địa phương.

Những tiện nghi ẩm thực tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, nổi tiếng với những tiện nghi ẩm thực đa dạng và phong phú. Du khách có thể tận hưởng dịch vụ phòng suốt 24 giờ, thưởng thức cà phê tại quán cà phê, hoặc thưởng thức các món ăn ngon tại nhà hàng. Ngoài ra, khách cũng có thể dùng dịch vụ phòng suốt 24 giờ hoặc sử dụng các tiện nghi BBQ, nhà bếp chung để tự nấu ăn. Khu nghỉ dưỡng cũng cung cấp dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày và buổi sáng có dịch vụ buffet.

Trải Nghiệm Phòng Nghỉ Sang Trọng Tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh mang đến nhiều lựa chọn phòng nghỉ cao cấp phù hợp cho mọi nhu cầu, từ các biệt thự biệt lập đến các căn villa rộng rãi. Bạn có thể lựa chọn các biệt thự 3 phòng ngủ với tầm nhìn vườn hoặc hồ nước, mỗi căn rộng đến 263 mét vuông, mang lại không gian thoải mái và riêng tư cùng hồ bơi riêng tư để thư giãn sau những ngày khám phá. Ngoài ra, các villa 2 phòng ngủ và 1 phòng ngủ cũng là lựa chọn lý tưởng, mang đến trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng đẳng cấp trong khung cảnh thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp của biển và hồ nước.

Đặt phòng qua Agoda không chỉ giúp bạn sở hữu mức giá tốt nhất mà còn mang lại trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng, nhanh chóng và không gặp rắc rối. Với hệ thống đặt phòng tiện lợi và chính sách hỗ trợ khách hàng tận tình, bạn có thể yên tâm về mọi khía cạnh của chuyến đi, để tập trung tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ bên bãi biển tuyệt đẹp tại Vinpearl Cam Ranh.

Cam Hải Đông - Bãi biển tuyệt đẹp ở Nha Trang, Việt Nam

Cam Hải Đông là một trong những bãi biển đẹp nhất ở Nha Trang, Việt Nam. Với cát trắng mịn và nước biển trong xanh, đây là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng không gian nghỉ dưỡng tuyệt vời. Bãi biển rộng lớn và không quá đông đúc, cho phép du khách thả mình trong làn nước biển mát lạnh hay thư giãn trên bãi cát nắng vàng.

Cách di chuyển từ sân bay đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh nằm ở Cam Hải Đông, Nha Trang, Việt Nam và cách sân bay Nha Trang khoảng 45 phút đi xe. Có hai sân bay phục vụ khu vực này là Sân bay Quốc tế Cam Ranh (CXR) và Sân bay Nha Trang (NHA). Dưới đây là một số phương tiện di chuyển từ sân bay đến khu nghỉ dưỡng:

1. Xe taxi: Bạn có thể dễ dàng tìm thấy các dịch vụ taxi tại cả hai sân bay. Tuy nhiên, hãy nhớ đàm phán giá trước khi lên xe và chọn các hãng taxi đáng tin cậy như Vinasun hoặc Mai Linh.

2. Xe đưa đón của khu nghỉ dưỡng: Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh cung cấp dịch vụ xe đưa đón từ sân bay. Bạn có thể liên hệ với khu nghỉ dưỡng trước để đặt xe và thu xếp lịch trình.

3. Xe buýt: Một lựa chọn kinh tế khác là sử dụng xe buýt công cộng để di chuyển từ sân bay đến khu nghỉ dưỡng. Bạn có thể đi bằng xe buýt từ sân bay đến trung tâm Nha Trang, sau đó chuyển sang xe buýt khác để đến Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh.

Dù bạn chọn phương tiện nào, hành trình từ sân bay đến Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh sẽ mang đến cho bạn cảm giác thoải mái và dễ dàng đến đích để tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Nha Trang.

Khám phá những điểm đến nổi tiếng gần Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh

Nằm tại vị trí đắc địa, Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh cung cấp một lựa chọn lý tưởng cho những du khách muốn khám phá những điểm đến nổi tiếng xung quanh. Với vị trí trực diện Bãi Dài, một trong những bãi biển đẹp nhất Nha Trang, du khách tại đây có thể tận hưởng những giây phút thư giãn trên cát trắng và ngắm nhìn khung cảnh biển xanh ngút ngàn. 

Ngoài ra, The Shack cũng là một trong những điểm đến hấp dẫn nằm gần Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh. Với phong cách kiến trúc độc đáo và không gian thoáng đãng, The Shack là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức những món ăn ngon và thư giãn sau một ngày dạo chơi trên bãi biển. Du khách có thể thưởng thức các món hải sản tươi ngon và đồ uống độc đáo trong không gian ngoài trời với không gian rộng rãi và view biển tuyệt đẹp. 

Với sự kết hợp giữa bãi biển đẹp như tranh và những điểm đến thú vị như The Shack, Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm tuyệt vời và khó quên.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh nằm gần nhiều nhà hàng nổi tiếng như Eo Gio Bai Dai Seafood Restaurant, Tropicana Beach Club, Sandals Restaurant, The Shack, La Casa, Quán Quỳnh Trâm, Golden Almie Coffee & Restaurent, Blu Lobster, Chaos Minute và The Colonial. Du khách có thể thưởng thức các món hải sản tươi sống tại Eo Gio Bai Dai Seafood Restaurant hoặc thưởng thức không khí biển tuyệt vời tại Tropicana Beach Club. Nếu bạn muốn thưởng thức một bữa tối lãng mạn, Sandals Restaurant là lựa chọn hoàn hảo với không gian ấm cúng. The Shack và La Casa cung cấp các món ăn đa dạng từ địa phương đến quốc tế. Quán Quỳnh Trâm là nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức các món ăn truyền thống Việt Nam. Golden Almie Coffee & Restaurent, Blu Lobster và Chaos Minute cung cấp các món ăn và đồ uống đa dạng, trong khi The Colonial mang đến một không gian sang trọng và thưởng thức ẩm thực châu Âu.

Giá trung bình của phòng tại Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh so với giá trung bình của một phòng khách sạn tại thành phố Nha Trang

Với giá trung bình của một phòng là $217, Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm nghỉ dưỡng xa hoa và tiện nghi đẳng cấp. So với giá trung bình của một phòng khách sạn tại thành phố Nha Trang là $67, giá của Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh có thể được coi là cao hơn. Tuy nhiên, giá này hoàn toàn xứng đáng với sự sang trọng và dịch vụ chất lượng mà khu nghỉ dưỡng này mang lại. Du khách sẽ được tận hưởng không gian nghỉ dưỡng đẹp mắt, bãi biển riêng và những tiện nghi hiện đại như hồ bơi, nhà hàng, spa, và trung tâm thể dục.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh - Một nơi tuyệt vời để nghỉ dưỡng gia đình

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh đã để lại ấn tượng tuyệt vời cho chúng tôi. Nhân viên tại khu vui chơi trẻ em rất tốt bụng, họ đã giúp cô con gái của tôi làm kiểu tóc, khiến cô bé rất hạnh phúc. Nhân viên thân thiện và hỗ trợ, đặc biệt tôi rất ấn tượng với dịch vụ và thái độ của anh Trung Nguyễn. Dịch vụ và đồ ăn tuyệt vời. Cơ sở vật chất sạch sẽ và an toàn, nhân viên thân thiện và tình cảm, cảnh quan tuyệt đẹp. Đây là một nơi tuyệt vời để ở cùng gia đình, giường rất thoải mái và đồ ăn tuyệt vời. Phòng sạch, hiện đại và rộng rãi. Dịch vụ và môi trường rất xuất sắc. Cơ sở vật chất và khung cảnh tuyệt vời. Chúng tôi đã có thời gian tuyệt vời ở đây.

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh: Nơi đáng đến với những đánh giá tuyệt vời từ khách hàng

Khu nghỉ dưỡng bãi biển Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh ở Nha Trang, Việt Nam đã nhận được những đánh giá tuyệt vời từ khách hàng. Với tổng điểm 8.8, đây là một điểm đến đáng để trải nghiệm. Khách hàng đánh giá cao giá trị của khu nghỉ dưỡng này với điểm 9.1, cho thấy đây là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho những ai muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ đẳng cấp mà không cần lo lắng về giá cả. 

Ngoài ra, khách hàng cũng đánh giá cao các tiện nghi tại khu nghỉ dưỡng. Với điểm 8.7 cho tiện nghi, Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh đảm bảo mang đến cho khách hàng những trải nghiệm thoải mái và tiện nghi. Đánh giá về vệ sinh cũng rất cao với điểm 9.2, cho thấy khu nghỉ dưỡng luôn được duy trì sạch sẽ và gọn gàng. 

Dịch vụ của nhân viên tại Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh cũng được khách hàng đánh giá cao với điểm 9.2. Nhân viên thân thiện và chuyên nghiệp sẽ đảm bảo rằng khách hàng nhận được sự chăm sóc tốt nhất trong suốt thời gian lưu trú tại khu nghỉ dưỡng. Mặc dù vị trí của khu nghỉ dưỡng nhận được điểm 7.8, nhưng Meliá Vinpearl Cam Ranh vẫn là một điểm đến hấp dẫn với các tiện ích tuyệt vời và dịch vụ chất lượng.

sample_comments.text:
Năm ngoái tôi đã ở lại 2 đêm và rất thích nên lần này đặt lại 2 đêm cho chuyến du lịch thai giáo. 

Tôi đã đặt một căn villa 1 phòng ngủ khá rộng với giá khoảng 2.200.000 đồng một đêm bao gồm bữa sáng.

Không phải là một chỗ ở mới nhưng có tuổi đời nên hơi cảm nhận được, nhưng nơi này được quản lý sạch sẽ nên tôi rất hài lòng.

Tuy nhiên, có vấn đề về tiếng ồn của dàn nóng điều hòa nên tôi phải liên lạc với lễ tân vài lần, nhưng nhân viên lễ tân luôn nhanh chóng và thân thiện nên không làm hỏng chuyến đi của tôi. (Nhưng cũng khá khó chịu)

Thời gian tôi ở không phải là lúc quá nóng nên khi dàn nóng ồn thì tôi tắt điều hòa, vì vậy tôi đã trải qua mà không phàn nàn gì, nhưng nếu đến vào thời điểm rất nóng thì có lẽ sẽ rất khó chịu. Khi đó chắc chắn nên đổi phòng (họ có nói sẽ đổi phòng nhưng chúng tôi đã tháo hết hành lý ra nên không đổi).

Ngoài vấn đề tiếng ồn đó, tất cả đều là những khoảng thời gian hoàn hảo. Bữa sáng có món ăn Hàn Quốc cũng khá đầy đủ nên ăn khá ngon, hồ bơi riêng cũng rộng rãi nên chúng tôi đã chơi rất vui. Hồ bơi chính không có nhiều người chơi nên rất thú vị. 
Nằm ở bãi biển riêng và có thể bơi biển thì quá tuyệt.

Các hoạt động thay đổi hàng ngày nếu đặt trước sẽ có thể tham gia nên tôi khuyên nên chuẩn bị kỹ lưỡng. (Tôi đã sử dụng yoga buổi sáng và thấy tốt).

sample_comments.room_type: Biệt Thự 1 Phòng Ngủ Hướng Hồ Có Bể Bơi Riêng

sample_comments.title: Kỳ nghỉ rất tuyệt vời!
sample_comments.positives: Xanh, sạch, nhân viên thân thiện
sample_comments.negatives: Bãi biển có rác chắc do hôm đó gió lớn nên đưa rác từ nơi khác trôi vào

sample_comments.text: Giá cả thực sự rất tuyệt vời... Nếu ở Gapeong mà có chỗ ở như thế này thì có lẽ tôi đã phải trả tới 1 triệu đồng. Khu nghỉ dưỡng lớn đến nỗi phải sử dụng buggies để di chuyển, nhưng khi gọi từ chỗ ở, buggies đến trong khoảng 10 phút, thật tiện lợi và thoải mái. Hồ bơi riêng rất sạch sẽ, sâu 1.2m, có vẻ sâu hơn tôi tưởng, nên rất thích hợp để vui chơi dưới nước. Tôi đã đọc được đánh giá rằng bữa sáng không ngon, nhưng tuy không ngon lắm nhưng có kimbap và kim chi, nên cũng đủ để lấp đầy dạ dày vào buổi sáng. Tôi cũng đã thuê xe đạp và đi xuống bãi biển riêng, thực sự đã có một kỷ niệm hạnh phúc, bãi biển riêng rất vắng vẻ, đẹp và cát mịn, nên có thể ở lại khu nghỉ dưỡng cả ngày cũng tuyệt. Thật tiếc là tôi không có nhiều thời gian ở lại chỗ ở vì phải đi tham quan. Chúng tôi ở 4 người trong 3 phòng, nên có tới 4 nhà vệ sinh khiến mọi thứ thật thoải mái và dễ chịu :) Điều khiến tôi cảm động nhất là khi tôi liên hệ trước để chọn chỗ này cho kỷ niệm 33 năm ngày cưới của bố mẹ, vào ngày hôm đó họ đã chuẩn bị một sự kiện dễ thương bằng cách tạo hình trái tim bằng hoa hồng trên giường và tặng một chiếc bánh mini xinh xắn với chữ "happy anniversary". Thực sự rất cảm động. Khu nghỉ dưỡng trả lời email chỉ trong một ngày, nên việc liên hệ là không khó khăn. Tôi thật sự rất hạnh phúc.

sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Nhân viên cực kỳ thân thiện và chuyên nghiệp
sample_comments.negatives: Bếp có nhưng không thể sử dụng

sample_comments.text:
Chào mừng trà thì không ngon lắm... ^^

Cảm ơn các nhân viên lễ tân rất thân thiện từ khi nhận phòng.

Tôi rất cảm ơn vì đã cho tôi nhận phòng sớm 1 giờ.

Phòng có vẻ hơi cũ, nhưng được bảo trì tốt nên không gặp vấn đề gì khi sử dụng.

Hồ bơi riêng, hồ bơi chính, và bãi biển đều được quản lý tốt. Đặc biệt, bãi biển ở khu nghỉ dưỡng này có độ sâu thấp, chỉ đến eo người lớn dù bạn ra xa một chút, nên trẻ em có thể chơi một cách an toàn.

Dịch vụ phòng, tiếp tân, nhân viên tuk tuk và tất cả các nhân viên đều rất thân thiện.

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Phòng ở rộng, đẹp, tiện nghi đầy đủ rất đáng tiền. Xe tuktuk nhiều nên ko sợ phải đợi lâu. Đồ ăn ngon nhưng cần đa dạng thêm.
sample_comments.negatives: Tuy nhiên nhân viên buffet sáng lại chưa nhiệt tình và niềm nở bằng các bạn ở lễ tân, hồ bơi, lái xe tuktuk.

sample_comments.text:
Tổng thể, nó rất xuất sắc. Vì tôi đã đặt với giá rất thấp, tôi không có kỳ vọng cao trước khi đến, nhưng nó tốt hơn nhiều so với những villa có hồ bơi khác. Cảnh đẹp thật tuyệt ngay từ cửa vào lễ tân, và hồ bơi riêng cũng rất đẹp.

Tôi cũng có thể thư giãn thoải mái tại hồ bơi chính và bãi biển riêng với cảnh đẹp tuyệt vời.

Nhân viên phục vụ rất thân thiện, và khi tôi gọi tuk-tuk, nó đến ngay lập tức.

Chương trình Mango Show thật tuyệt vời. Tôi thậm chí còn nhận được vé miễn phí cho chương trình đó.

sample_comments.text: Số lượng người là 4 và đã đặt phòng với giá vào khoảng 30 triệu, nhưng rất hài lòng vì có thể sử dụng biệt thự riêng. Có một em bé nên đã vui chơi rất vui vẻ ở hồ bơi kèm theo. Nhân viên thân thiện. Bên trong có hơi cảm giác cũ một chút.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text:
It was the worst service and staff I've ever been to.

For currency exchange, I asked the reception woman to exchange money, but before checking the exchange money, I ask the customer to sign it first.

The right thing is 
After checking the amount of exchange, the customer signs the exchange first.
If the exchange rate is different, do I have to sign it then?

And when I checked out, the staff's customer handling attitude was terrible, and I kept the customer waiting. I had to wait a long time to check out.
vinpearl Group was also known as a great company in Vietnam, but after this visit, I was very disappointed.
I hope you will become a great hotel with better service and staff management.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr/Ms Joo-Hyun, 
Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. While I wish you had a better experience, it is feedback like this that we learn from and use to improve. We work hard to deliver an exceptional guest experience, and it's apparent in this case that we fell short. If you give us a chance to earn back your trust, I can assure you that we will do our best to give you the great hotel experience that so many of our guests have grown so fond of. 
Sincerely, 
Tran Van Hung - General Manager

sample_comments.title: Nice resort without a wow effect
sample_comments.positives: Staff was really friendly, the house was spacious with more room than needed. Loved the food in the restaurants
sample_comments.negatives: Although a lot of effort was put into keeping the area and houses clean, it was evident that at least our villa was already old and worn-out.

sample_comments.title: Dont book here
sample_comments.text:
1. Location . From the city center 40min by taxi mean you should pay 900.000vnd two way. Own operate shuttle bus only 2 times day.
2. Resort but No facilities for cooking and washing machine...only one hot pot for water boiling. Food? only avaiable room service but ... not recommended
3. Not allowed bring any food but there has not any mini market inside also arounding resort
4. Breakfast menu....so so. How they ranked 5 star
5. Mainly...the location is far from down town.....so Loose time and cost for travelling.

If you want city travelling and shopping? Should not book In there....also name is resort? if you dont need washing wear and simpke cook gor your family? please checking othere place not here.
sample_comments.response:
Dear valued guest,

I regret to hear that your stay was not fully to your expectations and I have shared your comments with team to review the various points you have addressed. We already have upgraded some of our facilties, adding more bus to City and back the Hotel, improved our Buffet. 
Again, thank you for reviewing our resort and I do hope to welcome you soon again.
Best Regards,
Tran Hung- General Manager

sample_comments.title: Great place for familles!
sample_comments.positives: Spacious villa. Great for families with children. Staff super friendly and helpful. Beach are really nice. Pool staff and kids room staff are so kind.
sample_comments.negatives: Breakfast wasn't great with limited options yet good coffee. Food catering for Korean customers more and on the sweet taste, especially hot noodles. CapeNao restaurant crowded hence they served beer with plastic cup which was a surprise. Rooms are a bit run down as aircon leaked but staff fixed it quickly.

sample_comments.title: Bad experience, dirty
sample_comments.text: Late check in, dirty bed sheets, missing welcoming fruits + setup

sample_comments.room_type: 3-BEDROOM VILLA LAKE VIEW WITH PRIVATE POOL

sample_comments.title: Hopefully the management at this property can improve to match up with the overall worldwide Melia's renoun quality.
sample_comments.positives: There are definitely some highlights worth mentioning: the beach is very long, sandy, and beautiful, it feels private and exclusive. The amenities (linen, bedding, towels) are high quality and very comfortable. Breakfast was also good, and I especially appreciated the kindness of the tuktuk drivers, who were always friendly and helpful.
sample_comments.negatives:
I recently stayed two nights at Melia, and while there were some positives, I left feeling quite disappointed.
First, booking through the Melia website was impossible, no rooms were available at all. As a Melia Rewards member, this was frustrating because I couldn't use my points, which made my membership feel useless during this stay. I believe Melia should prioritize putting more availability on their own website, especially for loyal members. When I arrive at the property, I asked if I could add this booking to my Melia app, and they said no as I had to book via booking.com. So basically the Melia Rewards account was useless.

Second, despite checking in properly, my TV kept showing "Welcome Ms. ..." with another guest's name throughout my stay. A small detail, but it felt careless.

My villa was also located far from the beach, so tuktuks were always needed. The pool light was not turned on automatically either; we had to request it.

What left the worst impression, however, was at the restaurant. I asked for a larger glass to add ice to my coffee, but the staff told me that "other Korean guests asked for those big glasses already, and since no one could wash them, there were none left." This made me feel as though domestic guests were not being treated equally. A simple request for a glass shouldn't be too much to ask.
Overall, I expected a more seamless and welcoming experience from Melia. I hope management can take this feedback and improve both the service quality and member benefits.

sample_comments.title: The villas was perfect conditions, But staff should develop to english skills.
sample_comments.text: When i was arrived at the first time, the bell man was very kindly service. overall the bell man was kindly. but front desk staff should have develop to speak to english. And During the stay i was ordered the room service, and ate dinner at buffet restaurant . But dinner buffet was terrible. It mean the staff was provied terrible service . I don't want to talk much longer. During the two night staying , I felt upset . I look forward to the restaurant staff will be provide better service and develop to speak on english very well next time. Not Only resort villa facilities is good conditions.
sample_comments.response:
Dear valued guest, 
Warm greetings from Vinpearl Resort&Spa Long Beach Nha Trang
Thank you so much for staying with us. We highly appreciate your comments .We are very sorry that your stay with us did not meet your expectation. We have well noted your comments and reviewed with all of our team to improve our service, our Hotel also have trained English for all staff.
We would love to welcome you back for other stays in the future and hope to have the opportunity to deliver you a better service next time. 
Yours sincerely, 
Hoang Pham
General Manager

sample_comments.title: Beautiful property and rooms but the food quality did not meet our expectations.
sample_comments.negatives: The all-inclusive meals were not very delicious. While the Vietnamese dishes were consistently good, all the other food options were average. For the price paid, we were expecting better tasting food.

sample_comments.title: Above average
sample_comments.text: 가족이 머무를수있는 리조트에 취사도구가 구비되어있지않아서 무척 불편했음. 숟가락부터 필요한것은 1개에 3천원정도씩 주고 빌려야한다는게 이해되지 않음.

Nguyen Trat Luan (Mr.)

sample_comments.room_type: 3-BEDROOM VILLA LAKE VIEW WITH PRIVATE POOL

sample_comments.title: Enjoyed our 2 night stay. Wish we had stayed longer!
sample_comments.positives: The 3 bedroom villa was deluxe. It's very big with a lot of wasted space. Clean, comfortable, and the staff were well trained and friendly. One staff member recommended a nearby seafood restaurant for dinner and it was delicious. Tuk tuks came quickly. Very relaxing experience at our villa. The breakfast was pretty good but we only ate it twice. I could see myself getting sick of it if I stayed longer. I'm glad it came with our room rate.
sample_comments.negatives: The villa comes with a kitchen but it's not functional because there's no microwave or dishes or flatware. We ordered food delivery and luckily our order came with chopsticks, etc but when I inquired about how to get dishes and forks to use in our villa, I was told I had to rent them, which is just crazy. Items at breakfast would often run out and not be replenished quickly.

sample_comments.title: Nice resort but short on amenities and food is somewhat lacking...
sample_comments.text: We visited the Vinpearl resort in early January and although the grounds were nice and our villa quite spacious with 2 bedrooms and a pool, for the amount that you pay, there are much nicer resorts to be had elsewhere in Nha Trang. Go to the Mia Resort instead! Other than just a pool for entertainment, there is nothing else to do at this resort. There are no organized tours to Nha Trang other than a trip to a shopping plaza, and the beach is not usable due to the high waves and the rough waters. The food at the resort is good for breakfast, but for lunch and dinner there isn't any other options other than room service and the buffet at dinner (which does not offer very good food choices or quality of food). The staff tried their best to be a 5 star resort, but the Vinpearl is more of a 3-4 star resort if compared to North American standards. Special thanks goes out to Bao, Hong and Moon at the front reception desk who did an exceptional job at the resort!
sample_comments.response:
Dear valued guest 
First and foremost, I would like to express my gratitude for spending time sharing your constructive review about your stay with. 
It is good to know that you loved our beautiful accommodation, grounds and our staff; however, it is with regret to read about the shortcomings that you experienced and I sincerely apologize for all the inconvenience caused to you.
I hope this will not detract your overall perception of Vinpearl Resort &Spa Long beach Nha Trang, and that you would consider staying with us the next time when you visit Vietnam.

Best Regards,
Tran Hung- General Manager

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Designing, room size, staffs are so friendly.
sample_comments.negatives: The food variety was not good.

sample_comments.title: Not living up to a 5-star hotel standard
sample_comments.text: Villa is spacious, however that's the only advantage. The resort has three restaurants in total as stated on its website but only two of them were operating (one for snacks and drinks and another one for buffet). For the amenities in the villa, I think the management should at least consider to provide some cups and tableware which we could not find any during our stay (probably because of their policy that no outside food or beverage allowed) . For the facilities offered, the gym and sauna is fine. As for the beach just next to the resort, it's good. The "tuk-tuk" transfer service within the resort is what disappoint me the most. It took us more than 30 mins time to wait for the "tuk-tuk" to come and pick us and the communication with front desk was really inefficient that it took 3-4 calls for them to find someone who understand basic English! The room service (dining) was poor. Delivery of food took nearly 1 hr 30 mins and wasn't hot enough (could barely call it warm).
sample_comments.response:
Dear Chi

Thank you for spending time to writing your feedback We appreciate your comments regarding your stay at Vinpearl Resort &Spa Long Beach Nha Trang and please let me first and foremost apologize for the shortcomings you experienced. Please rest assured that what you mentioned in your review does not reflect the high standards we have set for ourselves. The issue you encountered has been immediately shared with management.
We thank you for identifying the improvement in the food quality and I have worked with our Executive Chef to address the issue.
Regarding your comment about the English skill of our staff, we are constantly providing English classes for our colleagues to improve further.

Once again thank you for your valuable feedback and sharing your experience.
We look forward to serving you again in the near future.

Best Regards
Cong Dung- General Manager

sample_comments.title: Well-managed and tranquil retreat.
sample_comments.positives: The upkeep of the grounds and facilities, including the villa and gardens, is commendable. The management team demonstrates a high level of efficiency and responsiveness in addressing guest requests. Additionally, the beach offers a private and serene retreat, providing a tranquil atmosphere with limited crowds.
sample_comments.negatives: The language barrier presents a challenge, as a limited number of staff members possess fluency in English, despite their genuine efforts to communicate. Additionally, the breakfast buffet could be enhanced by incorporating a wider variety of international options, as the current selection predominantly features Vietnamese cuisine. Although delicious, this limited selection may become repetitive. Offering a broader range of choices, particularly international dishes, would elevate the dining experience for guests from diverse backgrounds.

sample_comments.title: good place to take a rest
sample_comments.text:
resort was so good.
but there is nothing to do in resort.
only small swimming pool and beach.
no place to buy food.
only room service.

you must go to city for tour it takes 40 mins.

if you want to just take a rest I recommand you this place.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Guest,

Thanks very much for your comments. 
We are pleased, as it seems that overall you enjoyed your stay with us 

Best Regards,
Hoang Pham- General Manager

sample_comments.title: Amazing Staff and beautiful location!
sample_comments.positives:
love all of the staff there. They were always so helpful and gracious. Always have a smile on their faces. 
The Tuk Tuk is ALWAYS available and on time or early. 
The breakfast buffet was wonderful.
sample_comments.negatives:
Here are 3 things I would suggest correcting in the villa:
1. Dinner meal options needs to be better. The food and quality of choices, need to match with the breakfast choices. Most of the time we go to dine, the food seems old and not tasty. 
2. Washer/Dryer- as a family with 3 kids, it's important that we have access to a laundry room. This was really disappointing. The good news was, your staff was willing to help us find a local laundry place that was able to pick up, wash/dry our clothes for dirt cheap and best part, same day service! 
3. Plug-ins. My curling iron couldn't plug into the sockets....any sockets. So I couldn't do my hair during my 7 nights stay.

sample_comments.title: Foods are very bad
sample_comments.text: The breakfast and Dinner are not as Melia standard. Last 2 years, we already stayed this resort when it was still managed by Vinpearl. I have heard about management by Melia I hope it would be better than Vinpearl. But it was not as my expectation. The foods we enjoyed for two days were very bad. It is not standard as Melia as we have been experience for many Melia in Vietnam. It is not as valued we paid.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Ms. My,
On behalf of the management team and staff of Melia Vinpearl Cam Ranh Beach Resort, we would like to thank you for your sincere sharing about the resort. We are very sorry that your experience was not as expected. Your comments were highly appreciated, and since they will help improve our service, I have addressed them with all related departments for improvement. We hope your family's experience will be better when you come back to us.
We wish you and your family all the best. 
Regards, 
Nguyen Hai Au 
General Manager_ Melia Vinpearl Cam Ranh Beach Resort

sample_comments.title: A+ Service in 5 star setting
sample_comments.positives: The level of service was above and beyond what we expected. Anything we needed from questions about places to visit to needing dishes for the villa were quickly taken care of. Our family enjoyed the stay incredibly.

sample_comments.title: Nice resort
sample_comments.text:
Nice resort with nice staffs. 
Location is far from city.
We order room service for dinner inside the villa, but the food is not good, too salty.
sample_comments.response:

We thank you for your compliments regarding your stay with us and your nice commendation about our staff.
Besides, we also look into the food quality with Chef for further improvement.
Thank you again for sharing and look forward to welcoming you back in the not too distant future.

Tran Hung- General Manager

sample_comments.title: Kind
sample_comments.positives:
Room condition is perfect.
Resort staffs are very kind and e-mail respond is quick:)

sample_comments.title: Not a 5 star
sample_comments.text: Plus point is spacious and nice decoration villa. However we found more minus points. 1. there is only one restaurant in the resort serving just buffet whole day. If you want ala carte, you just can order in-room menu with limited choices. 2. Beach is not clean and no any sunbath chair on it. 3. Dont try cocktail in the pool bar. 4. Only complimentary drinks in mini bar. Even no wine glass in the room. 5. Not all the staffs are friendly and attentive at a 5 star standard.
sample_comments.response:
Dear valued guest,

We appreciate your comments regarding your stay at Vinpearl Resort& Spa Long Beach Nha Trang, and regret that your experience did not fully meet your expectations. Once again, thank you for sharing your comments with us. The issue you encountered has been immediately shared with management, and we are addressing this in our re-training program to provide you a better experience.

Best Regards
Tran Hung- General Manager

sample_comments.title: Beach and resort are perfect for a quiet getaway.
sample_comments.positives: Amazing resort! A little far from any other restaurants or food stalls. The food in the resort is decently priced and they have a decent variety. The resort has a little kids area that was a great perk! They have a few workers there that are so sweet and play with the kids. They have a nice main pool, a nice gym, nice bar at the beach and main building and a 5 Star Spa! They have a shuttle service around the resort since it's pretty big. You can still walk around though. They also have buffets! Oh, and their pizza was delicious!
sample_comments.negatives: The only thing I found inconvenient was that the pots and pans were not readily available for us to use. There is a whole process to request pots and pans in case you wanted to reheat food or cook something.

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: Staff of the resort are nice and helpful. But do not have much choice of restaurants. It's far away from town. It's relaxing if you only stay in Villas with private swimming pool. Recommend:)
sample_comments.response:
Dear valued guest, 
Thank you so much for choosing to stay at Vinpearl Resort & Villas Long beach Nha Trang for your vacation. We have well-noted your comments for service improvement. We would love to have chance to welcome you back in the future. Once again, thank you for your review.
Yours sincerely, 
Hoang Pham
General Manager.

sample_comments.title: It was the most memorable vacarion
sample_comments.positives: Manager was super nice and honestly every single staff were so nice. Best vacation we've spent and everything was so clean. Enjoy the private pool and their beach was just breathtaking.

sample_comments.text: Room is clean, facilities are still new. Breakfast is good, have a lots of choice.

sample_comments.text: I stayed for 2 nights at the Melia Vinpearl Empire Hotel in the city, and I chose it to relax at the pool villa. The size was large, and the accommodation was great, it was the best. It was also convenient to go out to the city, as there was a shuttle bus that I used well. I had dinner at the hotel Korean BBQ, and they provided a variety of meats, plus the drinks were free, which made it even better! ^^

sample_comments.title: Une magnifique maison avec piscine privé
sample_comments.positives: Top, très grand avec un service de transport en véhicule électrique très efficace. Petit déjeuner très bon et copieux, repas livré en chambre très bon (la salade cesar est top)
sample_comments.negatives:
Il manque des activités sur la plage. Pas de bateau, de kayak... II n'y a rien à faire en dehors du foot, du basket, du volley et du cerf-volant. Dommage 
Au niveau du repas, les pizzas ne sont vraiment pas top

sample_comments.title: Beautiful resort with a flaw
sample_comments.text: Our family stayed in 2 beachfront 3 bedroom villas. The villas were lovely with a spacious dining and living area and our own private pool. The rooms were comfortable. The breakfast was good and we liked the vietnamese dripped coffee, local pho, steamed rice rolls and yoghurts. The BIGGEST flaw was their F&B . We wanted to have dinner at the Seagate restaurant one evening and the waitress told us that all dishes will take 45min to 1 hour to arrive and recommended us to eat at the coffeehouse which we did. Yet, the food at the coffeehouse took more than an hour to arrive. The beef burger was tough and bun under toasted and cold. The fried morning glory was old, fibrous and tasted bad. We left it largely intact. The 2 club sandwiches arrived cold, the bread soggy and fries stale. The standard was really quite appalling. The kids who love pizza and fries actually didn't finish them despite being super hungry. Location wise they are close to the airport but 35 min away from the ccentre.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you so much for choosing to stay at Vinpearl Resort and Spa Long Beach Nha Trang for your vacation. Thank you for your review, we truly appreciate your constructive feedback. I'm sorry that we did not bring you good experience as you expected. I have addressed your comment with all related departments for improving. Look forward to your next visit soon.

Sincerely, 
Nguyen Trat Luan - General Manager

sample_comments.title: Super
sample_comments.positives: Le calme, le confort c'était vraiment reposant
sample_comments.negatives: Manque un peu d'activité et le buffet du soir trop chère pour se qu'il y a

sample_comments.title: Breathtaking hotel
sample_comments.text: Made the 'mistake' of booking a three bedroom house for 1. Was breathtaking. A whole house and pool. One of the most beautiful places I have ever stayed. Staff are pretty rude and food at restaurant for foreigners not great. But that is just the region I feel. This resort is truly epic and lucurious.

Thank you for taking the time to share your feedback. While I wish you had a better experience, it is feedback like this that we learn from and use to improve. If you give us a chance to earn back your trust, I can assure you that we will do our best to give you the great hotel experience that so many of our guests have grown so fond of.

Sincerely,
Nguyen Trat Luan - General Manager

sample_comments.negatives: Obligé de prendre un taxi pour aller n'importe où (Nha Trang est à 30 minutes)

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Le resort est composé d'immenses villas à l'américaine (ici vous ne trouverez pas d'authenticité vietnamienne par-contre).
Chaque villa possède une piscine privée (le gros plus de ce séjour!!!), en plus d'une piscine partagée (avec prêt de différents types de bouée qui raviront les enfants de tout âge) et le resort possède une plage privée également.
Il s'agit d'une grande structure mais tout est très bien organisé, le personnel est très réactif à toute demande.
La literie est très confortable et les chambres très spacieuse.
Le petit déjeuner est varié et change d'un jour à l'autre.
sample_comments.negatives:
Le domaine étant très grand, on doit nécessairement se déplacer en voiturette électrique mais le resort est bien organisé, il suffit d'appeler pour que quelqu'un vienne nous chercher.
C'est dommage, la cuisine est très grande avec plein de meubles mais elle n'est pas du tout équipée de vaisselle ni d'ustensiles.
C'est éloigné du centre-ville de Cam Ranh.

sample_comments.title: Great experience, but not as great as Vinpearl Discovery
sample_comments.text: The staff here is extremely friendly and attentive. However, it's 30 minutes driving from downtown. An only way to entertain at here is beach, or you can book tours at the resort.

Thank you for the great review of our hotel! We are glad that you enjoyed your stay and hope to see you again very soon.

Sincerely,

sample_comments.title: Etwas abgelegen, aber schöne Anlage
sample_comments.positives: Schöne Anlage
sample_comments.negatives: Das Hotel ist bereits etwas in die Jahre gekommen (teilweise abgenutztes Interieur) und sehr beliebt bei koreanischen Reisegruppen sowie russischen Touristen. Leider etwas abgelegen.

sample_comments.title: Great villa with beautiful clean beach and staffs are great!
sample_comments.text:
Villa is big, clean and equipped with essential amenities. Staffs were swift in attending to enquiries and extremely helpful although there were communication breakdown. Breakfast spread is good too.
Hotel took the initiative to surprise me with cake on my birthday. Not just a slice but the whole cake which was more than enough for the 10 of us.
I will definitely be back.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr Michelle,

Thank you for staying with us and have spent your time sharing your great stay experience at Vinpearl Resort & Spa Long beach Villas . 

Reviews such as these only prove how proud we are of our team who are naturally passionate to take care of our guests. The team really thank you for your kind words.

We hope that the travels will bring you back to Vinpearl soon. 

Hoang Pham
General Manager

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Sehr schönes weitläufiges Resort. Mitarbeiter zuvorkommend, hilfsbereit und freundlich. Frühstück mit allem was man braucht, asiatisch geprägt, aber auch internationales. Alle Villen mit privatem Pool und sehr großzügig geschnittenen. Restaurant Muie empfehlenswert, aber mit Luft nach oben.
sample_comments.negatives: Main-Pool eher ein Spaßbad als ruhige Poollandschaft, aber aufgrund der privaten Pools in den Villen verkraftbar. Fahrradverleih möglich jedoch sind keine Fahrten außerhalb des Resorts erlaubt. Das ist tatsächlich lächerlich und Bevormundung auf hohem Niveau.

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives:
Parkanlage, Level Lounge, Pool, Beach, Personal, Service, alles ganz hervorragend.
Der Stil ist golden bis barock. Aber die Anlage sehr schön gestaltet.
sample_comments.negatives:
Die Sylvester Party war "o.k.".
Buffet und Unterhaltung sehr gut.
Saal Dekoration eher nüchtern. Leider wirkte der Saal immer leer, weil die Gäste nicht dem Zeitplan gefolgt sind und kamen und gingen, wann sie wollten. Dadurch kann nicht so eine festlicher Feierstimmung auf.
Sehr missfallen hart uns die enorme Lautstärke bei der DJ Party in der Lobby während des New Year Count Down. Deutlich über 100 Dezibel und dazu ein dröhnendes Echo in der Halle. Es wurde zwar leiser gedreht, aber am Ende waren wir froh, dass die Musik nach 12 Uhr aufgehört hat. Schade...

sample_comments.title: Overall, I am very satisfied with the accommodation.
sample_comments.text:
If you wear the mask of a true emperor, you can do everything you want and be satisfied, and I would consider visiting again.

It must be the best private resort in Nha Trang.

However, while I'm obviously satisfied, there are many other reviews that mention good experiences, so I will share what I found unsatisfactory.

There are two points:

1. The swimming pool is very small, just a heads up; the pool bar is also lacking compared to other hotels.

2. Each guest is assigned a manager; mine was a person named Viet, who was very nice and easy to interact with. However, Viet matched me with a driver to the airport, and despite paying 2.5 million dong, the driver was extremely unfriendly. Among all the people I've met in Vietnam, he was the most unfriendly. He didn't respond or drive well. Keep this in mind, and it might be better to handle things on your own instead of relying entirely on Viet.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr/Ms. Kim, 
Thank you for choosing to stay at Melia Vinpearl Cam Ranh Beach Resort and for the valuable information you have shared with us. We look forward to welcoming you back to Melia Vinpearl Cam Ranh Beach Resort in the near future.

Nguyen Hai Au 
General Manager _ Melia Vinpearl Cam Ranh Beach Resort

sample_comments.title: Sehr Sauber gute Lage , Personal Umgebung Traumhaft Essen . Nur zu empfehlen.
sample_comments.positives: Super Gut .
sample_comments.negatives: Super Gut

sample_comments.title: Beautiful Villa but......
sample_comments.text: My wife and I stayed here with my parents for two nights. The villa itself was beautiful and we really enjoyed the pool. We just felt there were a few balls dropped in terms of what they provide guests. There were six phones in our villa but only two towels for the pool. The kitchen was large but had no kitchen equipment like cups for everyone or cutlery. I also would not recommend going for the Italian food at the restaurant as it was pretty terrible. I'm not a man who complains often, and especially about the standard of Italian food in a Vietnamese resort, but when there are about twenty Italian options on the menu and the lasagna has hot dogs in it, I have to mention it. The staff were excellent but I would say you can probably find a cheaper airport transfer than the one they provided. Pool time at the villa was fantastic though.

Sincerely, 
Nguyen Hai Au - General Manager
Melia Vinpearl Cam Ranh Beach Resort
sample_comments.room_type: 2-BEDROOM VILLA GARDEN VIEW WITH PRIVATE POOL

sample_comments.title: Im Großen und Ganzen, das war alles perfekt die kleinen Minuspunkte, das ist wirklich schon meckern auf hohem Noniveau
sample_comments.positives:
Wir waren eine Woche im Melia Cam Ranhund haben unseren Aufenthalt rundum genossen! Unsere Villa für vier Personen war traumhaft schön großzügig, sauber und perfekt zum Entspannen. Die gesamte Hotelanlage ist riesig, aber angenehm ruhig und sehr gepflegt.

Der Strand ist absolut atemberaubend: feiner Sand, kristallklares Wasser und - obwohl das Hotel gut gebucht war - immer freie Liegen. Man hat kaum andere Gäste gesehen, was für uns perfekt war. Beim Frühstück merkte man zwar, dass das Hotel voll ist, aber auf der Anlage und am Strand hatte man immer seine Ruhe.

Das Frühstück war sehr reichhaltig und lecker, und das Floating Breakfast war ein echtes Highlight - hat reibungslos funktioniert. Wer Ruhe sucht, ist in hier genau richtig - deutlich entspannter als im belebteren Nha Trang Für uns ist das Melia definitiv die beste Wahl in dieser Region.
sample_comments.negatives:
Einige kleine Minuspunkte:
 1. Der Zimmerservice war geschmacklich eher enttäuschend und für das, was geboten wurde, etwas zu teuer.
 2. Das benutzte Geschirr wurde unter einen Baum gestellt und trotz wiederholtem Vorbeigehen des Personals erst nach zwei Tagen abgeholt - hier wäre etwas mehr Aufmerksamkeit wünschenswert.
 3. Bei der Ankunft lagen in der Villa nur zwei Pool-Handtücher bereit - obwohl wir zu viert waren. Das wurde nach einem Anruf zwar sofort behoben, allerdings war am nächsten Tag nach der Reinigung wieder nur eine reduzierte Anzahl da. Auch das wurde schnell korrigiert, aber es sollte nicht regelmäßig passieren.
 4. Eine kleine Anmerkung: Am Übergang vom Poolbereich ins Wohnzimmer hätte eine rutschfeste Matte gutgetan - wir haben zwar ein Handtuch hingelegt, aber eine feste Unterlage wäre praktischer gewesen.

sample_comments.title: Great resort
sample_comments.text: Have a great time here
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Quý Khách

Chúng tôi xin gởi lời cám ơn chân thành đến gia đình vì đã lựa chọn Vinpearl Resort and Spa Long Beach Nha Trang cho những trải nghiệm đặc biệt của gia đình mình, và đã không ngần ngại chia sẻ những trải nghiệm này cùng với khách sạn.

Chúng tôi rất lấy làm vinh hạnh khi nhận được lời khen ngợi. 

Rất mong trong thời gian không xa, khách sạn lại có cơ hội chào đón gia đình mình quay trở lại.

Trân trọng,
Nguyễn Trát Luân
Tổng Quản Lý

sample_comments.title: Tolles Hotel an tollem Strand, perfekt um auf einer zweiwöchigen Vietnamreise ein paar Tage hier zu entspannen
sample_comments.positives:
Haus, Pool und Strand waren super. Wir haben uns gefragt, wo die ganzen Urlauber tagsüber sind, denn der Strand war super leer und es war jederzeit möglich, die wirklich schönen strandliegen zu bekommen. Buffet (Halbpension) war sehr umfangreich und lecker. 
Man konnte jederzeit über die Rezeption einen buggy ordern, der sofort kam und uns in einer Minute zum Strand gefahren hat.

sample_comments.title: nice and helpful staff
sample_comments.text: Although the staffs doesn't speack really well english, but they are still helpful and nice! Hotel little far away to city. If you planning to get away from the city, this is definitely a good choose. As their name long beach villa, their beach is really long and clean. For sure will come back for another stay if i visit nha trang.
sample_comments.response:
Dear valued guest, 

Thank you so much for choosing to stay with us for your vacation.

We are very glad that you had wonderful time at our hotel. Your compliments are of great value to all of us. As your comment, our Hotel have some course for staff to train and improve English.

We all look forward to welcoming you and your family back in your next visit to Nha Trang. 
Yours sincerely, 
Hoang Pham - Genneral Manager

sample_comments.title: Ein toller Strandaufenthalt in einem sehr komfortablen Hotel
sample_comments.positives: Wir können das Melia Vinpearl Cam Ranh Beach Resort sehr empfehlen, wenn man einen entspannten Urlaub am Strand machen möchte. Die Anlage ist sehr groß und sehr gepflegt und man wird auf Wunsch mit Golf-Carts rumgefahren. Der Strand war sauber, die Liegen sehr bequem. Der große Pool war sehr schön um Bahnen zu schwimmen, hatten aber auch große Schwimmreifen und Meehrjungfrauenflossen für die Kinder. Am Strand gab es Spielzeug für die Kleinen. Unser Haus war riesig, wir hatten zwei Schlafzimmer mit zwei Bädern und einer Gästetoilette. Der private Pool war sehr schön und die liegen auf der Terrasse auch. Wir hatten Halbpension und das Essen war sehr lecker. Wir hatten Behandlungen im Spa und die waren ausgezeichnet. Wir konnten mit dem Hotelbus auch in die nächste Stadt fahren. Der Flughafen ist nur 15 Minuten entfernt.

sample_comments.title: Lovely vacation
sample_comments.text:
We booked 3 bdroom villa with full board. 
pros- Meals were not bad at all, quiet and clean beach, new and clean villa... 
cons- Staffs' English was poor especially in the restaurant, check-in staff was not so friendly

비수기처럼 조용해서 오히려 좋았고, 해변도 나트랑 시내보다 깨끗해서 좋았어요. 풀보드로 갔는데 식사도 생각보다 만족스러웠습니다. 한국인분들한테 인기있는 리조트같은데 제발 여행다니면서 말좀 조심합시다. 특히 애데리고 다니는 젊은 엄마들, 다 조용히 쉬는데서 애티튜드 너무 거만하고 보기 싫었어요.
sample_comments.response:
고객님께,

피드백을 남겨주셔서 감사합니다. 저희 호텔에서 더 즐거운 경험을 하셨기를 바라지만 서비스 개선이 필요하다는 피드백을 주셨습니다. 저희는 고객 여러분들에게 최고의 경험을 선사하기 위해 노력하고 있습니다. 고객님의 경우에는 저희가 부족했던 부분이 있었습니다. 고객님의 신뢰를 회복할 수 있는 기회를 주신다면, 수많은 저희 고객들이 좋아하셨던 최고의 서비스를 경험하실 수 있도록 최선을 다하겠습니다.

감사합니다.

Hoang Pham
General Manager

sample_comments.title: Wir haben den Luxus und die Atmosphäre genossen
sample_comments.positives: Das Meer war sauber, was in Vietnam nicht selbstverständlich ist. Das Personal war reizend, aufmerksam und interessiert.
sample_comments.negatives: Vergleichsweise schneiden das zweite und das dritte Schlafzimmer von der Villa weniger gut ab. Es gibt weniger Fenster und die Aussicht war nicht so gut

sample_comments.title: That's nice.
sample_comments.text: I booked the accommodation based on a friend's recommendation. The hygiene conditions are good, and the resort is very clean and pretty. I had a great time swimming in the private pool after a long time. It's also nice to take a walk after meals. There were many options for breakfast, but I didn't find much to eat. This is just my personal opinion. If I come to Nha Trang again, I would love to come back.

sample_comments.title: Der perfekte Ort zur Entspannung
sample_comments.positives: Wunderschöne Villen, viel Platz, toller Garten mit Pool. Die Anlage ist sehr schön angelegt und liegt an einem wunderschönen Strandabschnitt. Das Frühstücks-Buffet ist riesig.
sample_comments.negatives: Nichts

sample_comments.title: So-so.
sample_comments.text:
It's close to the airport. 
The accommodation had a lake view, but there wasn't much difference, and instead, there was noise from across the lake. 
You need to book the shuttle from the airport to the accommodation in advance, and it's picked up at the domestic terminal. 
I ended up taking a taxi after waiting at the international terminal. 
There is only one swimming pool, but there is a children's playground and programs available. 
It's good for family vacations. 
There are scheduled programs, but I wasn't very satisfied. After signing up for Melia membership, you can enjoy free coffee at the Starbucks in the lobby. 
It's preferable to have accommodation close to the lobby. 
When you call a tuk-tuk, it usually takes about 10 minutes, but during busy times, it can take more than 20 minutes. 
If you order delivery, you have to go out to the entrance by the road. 
Overall, the accommodation is spacious and nice, but it feels like there is a lack of guidance. 
There are many Koreans and Russians, and it would be nice if there was just one information sheet in Korean. Customers have to walk around to see information one by one. 
There is a clinic in the lobby, so if you're sick, you can get medicine for free. 
Make sure to bring several shower filters. I stayed for three nights, but after just one night, the filter turned yellow.

sample_comments.title: Wundervolles Resort
sample_comments.positives: Wunderschön gestaltete Anlage mit tollem Strand, sehr freundliche Angestellte, professionelle Massage, stets rasch verfügbare Elektrotaxis in dieser grossen Anlage.
sample_comments.negatives: Für Kinder mittleren Alters (8-18jährig) kaum Angebote (beispielsweise keine Wasserrutschen), wobei unseren Kindern der Aufenthalt trotzdem sehr gefallen hat :-)

sample_comments.title: 2-night review
sample_comments.text: It was our second accommodation for a family of five, including my mother-in-law and two children, one in elementary school and one in middle school. We stayed for two nights in the city for good value and then moved to the resort for some relaxation. The atmosphere was luxurious, well-maintained, and pleasant. The tuk-tuk service was fast and all the staff were friendly. The biggest disappointment was that there was no washing machine or dryer in the room. We ordered pepperoni pizza and chicken schnitzel through room service, and my child said the pepperoni was thick but too salty. The dancing party at the main pool was immensely enjoyable, and since there were no other guests, our family exercised happily for 20 minutes. It takes about 40-50 minutes to get to the city. The shuttle needs to be booked before 8 AM the day before.

Antonin Konig (Mr.)

Melia Vinpearl Cam Ranh Beach Resort

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives: Location meravigliosa, con alloggi bellissimi. Il mare è verde smeraldo.
sample_comments.negatives: Il personale capisce e parla poco inglese.

sample_comments.title: A comfortable rest with family.
sample_comments.text: The accommodation was clean, spacious, and comfortable. The bed was large and comfortable, and the bedding was clean, making it very good for a restful sleep. The staff were also very friendly. The Wi-Fi was fast and stable. There was a sea nearby the private pool, making it great for water activities and relaxation. The quality of the private pool was a bit disappointing. It was nice being close to the airport. It is a bit far from the city, so shopping and sightseeing require some planning, but calling for Grab was quick and convenient, so there were no issues with transportation. Overall, I was satisfied with the value for money and returned happy.

sample_comments.title: 雖然中間有小插曲，晚上也下了很大的雨，但整體的經驗都非常好，員工都以笑臉工作，非常棒
sample_comments.positives:
早餐非常好，有特式冰鎮越南咖啡，麵包類居然有麻薯波波，早餐種類比晚上豐富很多。
Villa附的私人泳池非常好，高度大概1.25，想在泳池躺的話可以先買大型遊泳圈入去，因為入面的mini shop員有普通的尺寸。
員工非常友善，樂於助人，因為不只為何前一晚透過房間電話預訂的接駁車沒有出現在預約名單，但酒店職員非常迅速的幫我安排妥當，我要在此感謝用whatsapp幫我聯絡接駁車去市區來回以及去機場的員工，他的快速反應真的令我感到安心，令我可以玩到最後一刻都不怕趕不及乘車，thank you so much.
sample_comments.negatives:
晚餐自助餐很少選擇，海鮮類不新鮮。
員工在我check in完後沒有把護照還給我們，還好我在當晚發現，員工也立即把護照送回我房間，但我認為reception員工可以在發現後打電話到房間通知我們(因為中間曾經有員工打到房間做意見調查亦沒有提及我們遺留護照)，如果到了機場才發現就太晚了，希望酒店可以多加留意這類事情。

sample_comments.title: Close to the airport and great for whom will stay in the resort!
sample_comments.text: Less than 10 min away from the Cam Ranh int'l airport by taxi (7 seat taxi cost less than 200K VND). While all villas of this resort have private pool each. There is 1 open pool next to the beach. Who just want to have a relax and quiet holiday than busy visiting and traveling, this is a good choice.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr/Ms. Yongseok,

Thank you so much for staying with us and taking your time to write this review.
It is good to hear that you had a wonderful time with us. We appreciate your recognition for our great service in relaxing environment that made you feel comfortable and enjoyable. 
We all look forward to welcoming you back in the future.

Yours sincerely,
Nguyen Ngoc Hoang - General Manager

sample_comments.title: 아쉬운 많은 멜리아 빈펄 리조트 캄란
sample_comments.positives:
식사는 전반적으로 만족합니다.
식사 자리할 곳도 꽤 많고 만족 스러운 식사였습니다.
sample_comments.negatives:
1) 청결 상태 문제
-. 4 bedroom 인데 전반적이 청결 상태 괜찮음, 하지만 우리방에 여성속옷이 버려져 있었음..충격

2) 체크인 문제
-. 결재자 본인 이외에 그 누구도 체크인 할 수 없음(사전에 미리 양해 구해도 안됨)
-. 체크인 15시. 결재자 본인 12시에 먼저하고 본인확인하고 가족 중에 3시에 와서 체크인 한다고 하니 (체크인 한달전부터 멜리아 빈펄리조트와 e-mail로 결재자 12시에 본인확인하고 오후 3시에 가족이 체크인 한다고 사전에 조율 했었는데) 다시 결재자 본인부터 체크인하로가 함(시간 없는데, 또 여기서 한 40분이상 걸림). 왜 사전에 조율 했는지 이해 불가합니다.

sample_comments.title: 친절한직원 좋은 뷴위기 그것뿐인 곳
sample_comments.positives:
베트남 사람들의 특성인지. 직원들은 엄청 친절합니다. 
항상 웃는얼굴이고 필요한걸 먼저 물어봐줍니다. 
뷰도 좋고 룸 컨디션도 좋습니다 만.
sample_comments.negatives:
풀보드를 신청했는데 아침. 점심. 저녁 모두 같은 곳에서 식사를 하고 가격대비 식사가 매우 부실합니다. 
다른 빈펄이나 나짱의 깜란에 비교하면 많이 떨어져요. 
식사시간은 길지만 조금 늦으면 메뉴들이 말라져 있고 
6번의 식사중에 중복되는 메뉴가 너무 많았습니다. 
쥬스는 아침에만 제공되고. 
점심 저녁은 우유. 커피. 물만 제공됩니다. 

객실에는 주방이 구비되어 있지만 조리도구나 그릇, 식기는 없고. 
물도 1인 1병. 스낵바에도 없어서 추가로 구매해서 가져다 달라고 부탁해야했습니다. 
위치상 시내와 먼 곳인데 간식을 살만한 곳도 없어서 매우 불편합니다. 

휴양하기는 좋은 분위기지만 너무너무 심심하고 편의시설이 매우 부족해서 추천하고 싶지 않아요.

I love to stay on their private beach and the 4-bedroom villa is pretty clean and comfortable.
The view from our private pool is awesome. The facilities is good enough for 2 days stay. The only one thing need to improve is the reception staff is not friendly and I cant feel she welcome us and cant see her smile during the check-in time. I hope I can see the difference when i visit here next time.
sample_comments.response:

Please rest assured that what you mentioned in your review does not reflect the high standards we have set for ourselves. The issue you encountered has been immediately shared with management, and we are addressing this in our re-training program to provide you a better experience.

Once again thank you for your valuable feedback and sharing your experience.
Best Regards
Tran Hung- General Manager

sample_comments.title: Best value resort
sample_comments.text: There were 4 people and we made a reservation at a price in the low 30s, but we were very satisfied to be able to use the entire villa. Since we had a baby with us, we enjoyed playing in the attached swimming pool. There is one room on the first floor and another on the second floor, but the stairs to the second floor are quite a lot, so it might be difficult for those who have mobility issues. Each room also has its own bathroom. The resort is large, and you can call for a tuk-tuk using the phone provided, which usually arrives within 10 minutes. There are quite a few Koreans here. The breakfast is decent. The staff is friendly. The interior has a slightly older feel.

sample_comments.title: Need minor improvement. Would stay again.
sample_comments.text:
A 3-bedroom beachfront villa is an excellent option for larger groups, comfortably accommodating multiple adults and young children. The villa layout is convenient, with direct beach access and proximity to Building #4 and the pool dining area on the property map, where LEVEL benefits such as the secondary breakfast venue and lounge are located.

Positive points:
Service throughout the resort is attentive, with staff responsive to guest needs. LEVEL access provides added value, including breakfast by the pool, which offers a wider selection of freshly squeezed juices (such as pineapple, watermelon, and orange) as well as higher-quality coffee and tea and fresh meals served based on order. LEVEL guests also have access to the LEVEL Lounge, with cocktail hour from 4:00 PM to 6:00 PM, during which cocktails and light hors d'oeuvres are served. The lounge itself is accessible throughout the day.

The resort is compact and well designed, making it easy to reach most areas on foot. Both the beach and resort grounds are well maintained. This property is especially suitable for guests seeking a relaxing stay without plans to leave the resort.

Negative points:
Swimming at the beach may not always be possible due to strong currents, which is outside the hotel's control. Information regarding what is included with the LEVEL wristband could be communicated more clearly at check-in or during booking on third party sites, as the benefits may not be obvious to guests unfamiliar with the Meliá brand. LEVEL access can also be costly when purchased separately. Only those who made reservations on third party sites where it states "LEVEL" on the room/villa title will have access unless you purchase it separately at time of check-in. And only beachfront properties will automatically get LEVEL wristbands. Basic dining items such as plates, bowls, and cutlery were not provided in the villa and needed to be requested for an additional fee. Clearer communication about what kitchen or dining items are included would help set expectations, especially for guests staying in villas. 

For villas with private pools, additional outdoor space or facilities for drying wet swimwear would be a practical improvement.

It would be our great honor to have the pleasure of welcoming you and your family again on your next vacation.
Wishing you and your family good health, continued success, and happiness.
Warm regards,
Tran Thanh Cong (Mr.)

sample_comments.title: Perfect resort for families
sample_comments.text:
I stayed Vinpearl long beach for 3 nights with my whole family(6 adults and 3 children)
Everything was perfect except for the distance to the Nha Trang City.
It took almost 40 minutes to the downtown and it could be a significant disadvantage.
However, we all loved our resort.
Clean and safe facilities, kind and gentle employees, great views and landscape.
There was nothing to complain. Especially I'd like to praise Korean female worker.
Her name is Su-Jeong, Huh. She helped me so much that I could handle small problems in there.
On the second day, my pool's lights went out. So I asked to fix them.
Two male workers came to my pool and tried to fix 3 lights but only two lights turned on.
They said sorry. I didn't know what to say because I saw them doing their best to fix the problem.
I was so moved by their attitude.
To me, Vinpearl long beach was very close to heaven.

sample_comments.title: Excellent resort- value for money
sample_comments.text:
The property is excellent. Clean, modern and spacious. The cost of a night is extremely competitive and represents excellent value. Very close to airport and ideal for a quiet getaway. 

The staff training needs a lot of work though. They are very inconsistent. Evident through the breakfast served whereby I had 5 days of oatmeal porridge and everyday tasted different, runny, thick, salty and not much oatmeal. The reception also needs some staff training as they insisted that I should pay for room service with my card though I had deposited pre authorisation with them on my credit card. The room service menu could be improved given most stays around a week and no choice outside. However, if you want a special treat, head to Mia hotel, Le baia restaurant. Excellent service and food.

sample_comments.title: A place that I highly recommend.
sample_comments.text:
Last year, I stayed for 2 nights and liked it so much that I booked another 2-night stay this time for a baby moon trip. 

I reserved a spacious 1-bedroom pool villa with breakfast included for about 220,000 won per night.

It's not a brand-new accommodation, so you can feel a bit of age, but it was very clean and well-maintained, which I was very satisfied with.

However, there was an issue with the noise from the air conditioning outdoor unit, which required me to contact the lobby several times, but each time, the lobby staff responded quickly and kindly, so it didn't ruin the trip. (Nonetheless, it was quite bothersome.)

During my stay, it wasn't extremely hot, so when the outdoor unit was noisy, I could turn off the air conditioning without much dissatisfaction, but I think it would be tough to come during very hot weather. In that case, changing rooms would definitely be the better option (they offered to switch rooms, but we decided not to because we had unpacked a lot).

Aside from that noise issue, everything else was perfect. The breakfast had a good variety of Korean dishes, and it was quite enjoyable, and the private pool was spacious enough to have a great time. The main pool had few people, which made it fun as well. I think it would be wonderful to lie on the private beach and swim in the sea.

The daily changing activities can be booked in advance, so I recommend preparing and making those reservations. (I used morning yoga, and it was great.)

24일부터 30일까지 6일간 가족과 머물며 즐거운 시간을 보냈다. 
아침조식은 상당히 만족스러웠고 아이들이 매우 좋아했다. 
빌라 수영장과 주변은 관리가 잘되고 청소도 깔끔했다. 
카페나노에서 저녁식사를 했는데 크리스마스 분위기와 음식도 상당히 마음에 들었다. 
모든 Staff들이 매우 친절했으며 주변 산책을 하다 마주치면 웃으며 인사를 하는 모습이 매우 좋았다. 
룸서비스를 이용했는데 가격은 합리적이였고 맛도 있었다.
sample_comments.negatives:
크리스마스 이브 갈라 디너에 참석했는데 뷔페는 별로였다. 그리고 크레이피쉬가 별도로 나왔는데 거의 식어서 나왔고 맛도 없었다. 
1층 화장실 문이 잘 닫히지 않았고 문을 잠그는 장치가 잠근 상태에서 빠져서 곤란한 상황을 겪었다. 
그리고 2층 화장실 문 옆에 있는 타일이 떨어질 듯 붙어 있어 위험해 보였다. 
빌라 내부를 꼼꼼히 점검해서 보완할 부분들은 신속하게 보수를 하길 바란다.

sample_comments.positives: 직원들이 너무 친절합니다! 직원들이 어떻게든 고객을 도와주려고 애써주시는 모습이 너무 감사하고 좋았습니다. 리조트 시설도 좋고 전객실 풀빌라여서 그런지 프라이빗해서 좋았습니다. 침대도 편했고 방의 온도나 습도가 적당했습니다.

sample_comments.title: It's perfect as a summer vacation resort.
sample_comments.text: I traveled with friends and it was really great. If it were in Korea, I wouldn't have been able to find such accommodation at this price, but I had a nice, affordable stay. First of all, the private pool was a hit since we could swim comfortably even at night. The private beach was also very convenient with sunbeds and towels provided. The breakfast had a lot of variety and the taste was not bad at all. The cleanliness of the accommodations was neat, and above all, all the staff members were very kind. They responded immediately to requests and were always welcoming with a smile. However, the resort is a bit far from the city center, so it can be inconvenient for sightseeing. There is a shuttle service, but the schedule is quite limited, making it hard to match our desired times. We used the shuttle when going out and took a taxi on the way back, which took about 40 minutes to the downtown area of Da Nang. Aside from that, everything was very satisfying!

sample_comments.title: Excellent
sample_comments.positives:
모든 객실이 풀빌라이고 조용해서 완전한 휴식을 취하기에 완벽한 장소에요.
리조트내에 가로수가 망고나무로 돼있어서 이국적인 풍경을 느낄 수 있고 건물들이 깔끔해요.

객실은 1베드룸 선택했고 2층 건물에 1층만 사용할 수 있게 돼있어요. 2층은 올라가자마자 객실인데 전부 잠겨있어요.
1층에 거실과 주방, 다이닝 공간, 화장실, 침실과 화장실겸 샤워실이 있는데 공간이 넓고 고급스러워요.

청결에 예민한편인데 침구와 화장실 등 객실이 모두 깔끔하게 잘 관리되고 있었어요.
수압이나 온수 조절 잘되지만 샤워필터는 따로 챙겨가는것을 추천합니다.

객실 수영장은 거실과 침실을 통해 출입이 가능해서 접근성이 좋아요.

리조트가 워낙 넓어서 이동은 툭툭으로 하는데 부르기도 편하고 빨리 도착해서 타고 다니는 재미가 있어요.
일부러 산책삼아 걸어다니면 툭툭 기사가 툭툭 필요하냐며 친절하게 말 걸어주고는 해요.
직원들이 모두 친절해요.

체크인할때 멜리아 멤버쉽? 가입하면 포인트 사용할 수 있다고 알려주는데 덕분에 해변쪽 수영장에서 놀다가 피자 시켜먹을때 유용하게 사용했어요.

나트랑 시내까지 가는 무료셔틀버스를 운영중이니 셔틀버스 시간 잘 체크해서 이용하는것도 추천해요. 이용 하루전 예약은 필수.
sample_comments.negatives:
리조트내에 매점이 없으니 체크인전에 외부에서 충분한 물품을 구매해서 들어가는것을 추천합니다.
바로 옆 알ㅁㅏ리조트에 마트 있기는한데 걸어가기에 꽤 멀고 길이 마땅치 않아요. 

 객실내 수영장 수질이 겉보기에는 깨끗한데 발바닥에 자꾸 뭐가 걸리적거려서 물안경 쓰고 보니까 타일 깨진것과 백시멘트 조각, 나뭇잎 등 부유물이 많더라고요.
그냥 수영장은 좀 관리가 안되는가보다 하고 놀았는데, 둘째날 저녁에 야간수영이 하고싶어서 수영장 내부 조명 켜달라고 전화했더니 직원을 보내줘서 그 직원이 수영장 옆 지하로 들어갔는데 한참을 안나오더니 망가졌다고 다음날 오전에 고쳐준다고 하고 갔어요. 그리고 다음날 오전에 와서 한참 걸려서 고쳤는데 조명뿐만 아니라 물 여과장치까지 작동하더라구요...ㅎㅎ 그제서야 수영장 물이 더러웠던게 이해가 되더라는...여과되지 않은 수영장 물에서 2박 3일을 신나게 잠수하며 놀았더니 부비동염 걸려버렸습니다..ㅎ
고장난걸 진작 알아차렸더라면 객실 바꿔달라고 요청했을텐데 체크아웃하는 날 알아차려서 좀 아쉽더라구요.

그리고 수영장이 1.25미터인가? 수심이 좀 낮아요.
해변쪽 수영장은 좀 더 깊을까 기대했는데 객실 수영장과 수심이 같아요. 

 리조트 앞 해변은 풍경이 예쁜것과는 상반되게 해수욕객이 별로 없더라구요. 바다 들어가보니 이유를 알겠더라구요.
수심은 비교적 깊지 않은데 입수금지 라인이 없다보니 어느만큼까지가 들어가도 안전한지 알 수 없고, 큰 파도는 없으나 수면 아래 조류가 쎄서 맘 놓고 놀기에는 좀 무서워서 금방 나왔어요.

 리조트내에서 푹 쉴 생각으로 풀보드 신청했으나 다시 간다면 하프보드나 조식만 신청할거에요. 풀보드로 세끼를 해결하자니 굉장히 물려요. 뷔페라지만 음식 가지수가 적고, 한국식으로 나오는 음식(떡볶이, 김밥, 양념치킨 등)은 한국음식이 맞나 싶을 정도로 이국적이고 맛이 없어요. 조식때만 쥬스 제공되는것도 킹받....

 망고쇼 다들 추천하길래 기대가 컸는데, 내 기대와는 다르게 그 어떤 퍼포먼스도 없고 그냥 조용히 망고로 만든 음식 나눠주는거 먹는게 다였음. 망고쇼는 칵테일 파는곳 안쪽에서 진행되는데 그 이상 어떠한 안내도 없음. 그래서 줄 서서 기다려야하는건지, 서서 구경해야하는건지, 앉아서 기다려야하는건지 어떻게 해야하는지 안내해주는 사람이 없어서 답답했음. 앉아서 한참 기다렸는데 나보다 늦게 온 사람에게 음식이 더 먼저 나가기도 했음. 망고로 된 음식은 코코넛가루 뿌린 찰밥과 망고퓨레&노란망고 사이드로 조금, 그린망고 채썬것 간장 무침, 그린망고 깍뚝썬것 고춧가루 버무리. 그린망고는 좀 생소하다보니 입맛에 맞지 않았고 생과일로 먹을수있는 노란 망고는 따로 나오지 않는지 물어보니 그날은 제공되지 않는다고ㅜㅜ

sample_comments.title: This is a review of a 2-night stay!
sample_comments.text:
To get to the conclusion, I regretted that we only stayed for 2 nights. Since it was our first time in Nha Trang, we stayed 2 nights in the city and 2 nights at the resort, but I think we could have just stayed 4 nights at the resort.

Our room was a one-bedroom pool villa, and the cleanliness was perfect. However... although we didn't see it inside the room, we were surprised to see a lizard and a snail outside the room, but I had already come across this in reviews, and above all, I thought the nature was nice, so I shrugged it off. I just thought I needed a place to sleep and as long as they don't stick to my body, it was fine...?

Also, the breakfast menu was simpler than expected. It wasn't very delicious, but it wasn't terribly bad either. I was a bit disappointed that the menu was mainly focused on Korean food. We didn't have lunch, and for lunch on the second day, after playing in the water for a long time, we used a delivery app to order fruits. For dinner, we ate at the buffet both times and got a discount for guests, paying 140,000 VND for two people. I felt that the buffet menu on the second day was simple, and the taste was just passable. If we had stayed for more than 3 nights, I think we might have ordered delivery at least once.

For amenities, we only used the pool, and the public pool had a lot of floating debris in the water and broken tiles here and there. We didn't get hurt, but our child seemed to get a bit hurt while playing. We did see them doing repair work in a hurry in the evening, but they were only working on the edges of the pool, not the bottom. I think this should be improved for safety, and for now, it might be a good idea for kids to wear aqua shoes while playing! The private beach was very quiet and there were plenty of sunbeds, so we enjoyed it leisurely. However, it was disappointing that we couldn't swim because the waves were too high.

The tuk-tuks arrived within 5 minutes when called from our room, probably because our room wasn't far from the lobby. Since it was close to the lobby building, we just walked when we went for meals. After dinner, it didn't take long to walk to the resort beach for some digestion. If the weather hadn't been so hot, walking could have been an option, but why walk when you can avoid sore feet? Calling a tuk-tuk will take you anywhere you want!

I had a 60-minute foot massage at the spa, but since I don't know about the body massage, my impression from the foot massage was that if I spent that money, I would rather request Grab to go to the city for a massage... They also gave a 30% discount coupon if you eat the dinner buffet, so I made a reservation. However, both my husband and I felt that the therapists were chatting with each other during the massage, which made it hard for them to concentrate on the massage. Although it wasn't loud, it was a bit bothersome. Later, when I coughed a few times out of discomfort, they did pause briefly. If you are only going to get a foot massage, it might not be a bad idea to get it in the city.

There were some disappointing aspects, but overall it was a place where I could truly feel relaxed, and if I have the opportunity, I would want to visit again. Overall, the room was very pleasant!

Dear Mr/Ms. SUMI,

sample_comments.title: 멜리아 빈펄 깜란 리조트 덕분에 아주 만족스런 휴가
sample_comments.positives: 아침조식 종류가 많아서 아주 좋았습니다.. 매일 블럭을 나누어서 머는 재미가 있었고, 식품들도 신선했습니다. 잠자리도 조용하고, 깨끗하고, 아늑하고 편안하고 매우 만족스러웠습니다. 시내와 오고가는 셔틀도 매우 좋았습니다. 나트랑 시내까지 불편없이 이동 가능해서 알찬 여행이 되었습니다.
sample_comments.negatives: 숙소와 주의 레스토랑, 식료품점들의 거리가 떨어져있어 아쉬웠습니다.

sample_comments.title: I want to use Melia BinPurl again next time.
sample_comments.text: The resort had an old feel but was spacious and nice. Above all, I liked that it had a private pool, but I wasn't sure if it had purification facilities, so I questioned whether it was clean while swimming... but I swam with cloudy eyes. ㅜ_ㅋㅋ It was great because it connected to the beach for relaxing. All the staff were friendly. A shower filter is essential, absolutely necessary. I stayed for a few days and the filter turned completely black. It is definitely necessary~~. However, other resorts in Nha Trang also require a filter, so it's not just the water quality here, I just assume it's because of that. ㅋㅋㅋ I recommend Melia!!

sample_comments.title: 친절함의 끝판왕
sample_comments.positives:
직원분들이 정말 친절했습니다.
저희가 머무는 동안 태풍으로 인한 안전을 위해 숙소를 옮겨주시고 요구하는 모든것들에 친절했습니다.
저희는 비치리조트(해안가 숙소예약 비용이 조금더비쌈)을 예약해서 더 레벨 라운지를 이용 할수 있어서 라운지에서 술과 음료와 간단한 음식을 즐길 수 있어서 좋았습니다.
sample_comments.negatives: 초기 결재한 카드가 유효기한이 도래되어 새로운 카드 발급받아로 들고가서 다른카드로 다시 결재하는 문제가 있었는데..저희실수이기도하지만 도착두달전에 숙소에서 결재가 이미 마무리 되었는데 굳이 같은 카드가 필요했는지 의문이 들긴하네요.기존 결재금액의 환불이 언제될지가 변수인거같네여.확인잘하시고 가셔야할듯요~

sample_comments.title: A place I want to visit again next time!
sample_comments.text: This place left a great memory for Melia. My next trip is to Da Nang, and I really want to use Melia again then! The breakfast was tough to eat because the meat had a strong spice smell, but the other food was generally satisfying. The accommodation was really spacious for the price, the air conditioning was great, and I didn't see a single bug! I saw a lot of snails near the pool by the garden, but I didn't see any other pests. Not only was the room condition great, but the kindness of the staff was also really nice, and since it's so big, I had to use the buggy, but it always came quickly. In particular, when I mentioned wanting to inflate the tube and arm ring for my child before playing in the private pool, a staff member came directly to take them and even inflated them at the main pool. I was so touched by their kindness, I felt bad about it... The room service was also really cheap, and the fries were so delicious!

Nguyen Hai Au

sample_comments.title: A pleasant accommodation.
sample_comments.text: Six of us stayed at the Melia Vinpearl Khamran Resort in a Level 3 room, and the accommodation was large and beautiful, leaving the family very satisfied. The staff were also very kind, and I vividly remember them always smiling brightly when they saw us. I was very touched when I mentioned it was my father's birthday, and they prepared a cake and a long heartfelt letter for him. If I have the opportunity to go to Nha Trang again, I would definitely like to stay there once more. Although we stayed only one night, we took many beautiful photos and created wonderful memories with my family by the pool that I will never forget.

sample_comments.title: Melia Vinpearl Cam Ranh Beach Resort
sample_comments.text:
Overall, it was excellent. Since I booked at such a low price, I didn't have high expectations before arriving, but it was much better than other pool villas. The view was stunning right from the entrance at the reception, and the private pool was beautiful as well.

I was also able to relax comfortably at the main pool and the private beach with great scenery.

The service staff were friendly, and a tuk-tuk arrived right away when I called.

The Mango Show was fantastic. I even received a free ticket for that.

sample_comments.text:
The welcome tea was not very tasty... ^^

Thank you to the very kind reception staff from check-in.

I really appreciated being allowed to check in an hour early.

The room felt a bit outdated, but it was well-maintained, and I had no issues using it.

The private pool, main pool, and beach are all well-maintained. Especially, the beach on this resort side has shallow water, so even after going out for a while, the water only reaches up to an adult's waist, making it safe for kids to play.

All the staff, including room service, reception, and tuk-tuk drivers, are friendly.
